title: Game News Round-Up
summary: Daily curated games-industry news digest for 24 December 2024.

items.title: **Cyberpunk 2077** characters now available in Fortnite
bullets: For a limited time, grab female V and Johnny Silverhand (Keanu's second appearance in Fortnite) in a bundle
Other items such as the mantis blades and a vehicle inspired by Cyberpunk available

items.title: **Sega** says it’s weighing up launching its own game subscription service
**Sega** isn’t planning more mini consoles: ‘We are not a retro company’
bullets: “We really appreciate our legacy, we value it, but at the same time, we want to deliver something new – otherwise we’ll become history. That’s not what we’re aiming for.”

items.title: **Aonic** secures over €150m in funding
bullets: Aonic has received a €152 million investment after entering an agreement with Metric Capital Partners and Active Ownership.
Metric Capital Partners have provided €100 million of the funding, while the remaining €52 million has been converted from Active Ownership's shareholder loan.

items.title: Thats a wrap on the Game News Round-Up 2024! From me and the rest of the Game News Round-Up team, thank-you for being a part of this little thing we've made and we hope you continue to enjoy the Game News Round-Up in the new year and beyond. 2025 is set to be an insane year for video-games (new hardware, massive games like GTA6 and other surprises on the way!), so I hope you all continue to enjoy the wild world of game news with us!
